queries.question: What is the most populous city and its associated campus?
queries.sql: select L.Name, C.campus_name from City L inner join Campus C on C.city_id = L.id order by L.population LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?campus_name WHERE {
  ?l a :City .
  ?c a :Campus .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?l p:name ?name .
  ?c p:campus_name ?campus_name .
  ?l p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which state and city was the campus where Alice Johnson was teaching on the 1st of June 2021 located?
queries.sql: select L.name, S.full_name from City L inner join Campus C on C.city_id = L.id inner join teachesAt TA on TA.campusId = C.id join State S on C.state_id = S.id  inner join Teacher T on T.id = TA.teacherid where TA.startDate < '2021-06-01' and ta.endDate > '2021-06-01' and T.email= 'alice.johnson@example.com'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?full_name WHERE {
  ?l a :City .
  ?c a :Campus .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?ta a :teachesAt .
  ?ta p:hasCampus ?c .
  ?s a :State .
  ?c p:hasState ?s .
  ?t a :Teachers .
  ?ta p:hasTeacher ?t .
  ?l p:name ?name .
  ?s p:name ?full_name .
  ?ta p:startDate ?startdate_f .
  ?ta p:endDate ?enddate_f .
  ?t p:email ?email_f .
  FILTER(STR(?startdate_f) < "2021-06-01")
  FILTER(STR(?enddate_f) > "2021-06-01")
  FILTER(STR(?email_f) = "alice.johnson@example.com")
}

queries.question: What is the most populous location and its associated campus?
queries.sql: select L.full_name from State L inner join Campus C on C.state_id = L.id inner join City ct on C.city_id = ct.id order by ct.population LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?l a :State .
  ?c a :Campus .
  ?c p:hasState ?l .
  ?ct a :City .
  ?c p:hasCity ?ct .
  ?l p:name ?full_name .
  ?ct p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What is the most populous location and its associated campus?
queries.sql: select S.full_name, L.Name, C.campus_name from City L inner join Campus C on C.city_id = L.id  join State S on C.state_id = S.id  order by L.population LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?name ?campus_name WHERE {
  ?l a :City .
  ?c a :Campus .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?s a :State .
  ?c p:hasState ?s .
  ?s p:name ?full_name .
  ?l p:name ?name .
  ?c p:campus_name ?campus_name .
  ?l p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the most populous location and its associated campus?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?campus_name WHERE {
  ?l a :City .
  ?c a :Campus .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?l p:name ?name .
  ?c p:campus_name ?campus_name .
  ?l p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?full_name ?name ?campus_name WHERE {
  ?l a :City .
  ?c a :Campus .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?s a :State .
  ?c p:hasState ?s .
  ?s p:name ?full_name .
  ?l p:name ?name .
  ?c p:campus_name ?campus_name .
  ?l p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?l a :State .
  ?c a :Campus .
  ?c p:hasState ?l .
  ?ct a :City .
  ?c p:hasCity ?ct .
  ?l p:name ?full_name .
  ?ct p:population ?population_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
